Class HistoryquoteLegacy

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.ProposeTransientTransfer
grafioschtrader.entities.BaseHistoryquote
grafioschtrader.entities.HistoryquoteLegacy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class HistoryquoteLegacy extends BaseHistoryquote implements Serializable
Shadow archive of a security's end-of-day prices, preserved when its feed connector or url_history_extend changes so that history the new connector can no longer supply is not lost. Rows are populated automatically on a connector change and via CSV import; they are consulted on every subsequent reload to supplement the live Historyquote table with dates the new connector does not cover.

Unlike the live table, the archive carries a transfer_date (the archival batch boundary, used to compute the post-archival split factor at supplement time). The trading date is unique per security. Editing and deleting individual archived rows follows the same propose-change approval flow as Historyquote (see BaseHistoryquote); new rows are not created one-by-one through the UI.

See Also:
